widgets.label: PMA Dimension Scores (radar chart)
widgets.source: ACS 5-Year + HUD LIHTC DB + FRED + DOLA
widgets.notes: Composite PMA score (0–100) derived from 50/30/20 weighted sub-indices. Scoring logic in js/market-analysis-enhancements.js.

widgets.label: LIHTC projects in buffer
widgets.notes: Projects within the selected buffer radius, excluding expired affordability periods.

widgets.label: Existing LIHTC units in buffer
widgets.notes: Low-income unit count summed across projects in buffer.

widgets.label: Capture rate (existing LIHTC)
widgets.notes: Existing LIHTC units ÷ renter households in buffer. ACS B25003 for renter HH denominator.

widgets.label: Renter households in buffer
widgets.notes: Estimated renter households within the buffer from ACS B25003.

widgets.label: Units in Prop 123 jurisdictions
widgets.notes: LIHTC units in jurisdictions participating in Colorado Proposition 123.
